title: Venezuelan Pasta Primavera
description: A vibrant and flavorful plant-based pasta dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine. This recipe is a delicious and easy way to enjoy a vegan meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the bell peppers and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Stir in the soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the pickled onion and citrus juice.
Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the vegetable mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the pasta is well coated with the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with additional citrus wedges if desired.
Optional: add your favorite vegan protein such as tofu or tempeh to the skillet with the vegetables.
